message:
test(fcp-cli): Add audit chain verification integration tests (bd-1im5)

Add 8 integration tests for `fcp audit verify` command covering:
- Valid chain passes verification
- Missing link (seq gap) detection
- Fork detection
- Genesis validation (seq 0 requirement)
- Prev pointer mismatch detection
- Empty chain warning
- Zone filter validation
- Required --events flag validation

Tests emit structured JSONL logging per STANDARD_Testing_Logging.md
with test_name, module, phase, correlation_id, and result fields.

Closes: bd-1im5, bd-1did

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
